name: Subject Line Scorer
description: Scores cold email subject lines on deliverability, curiosity, personalisation, and spam risk. Returns a 0-100 score with improvement suggestions.
agent_instructions: This is a browser-based tool. To use it, navigate to the URL and enter a subject line in the input field. The tool returns a score out of 100 with breakdown across 4 dimensions and improvement suggestions. For API access or integrations, contact the owner via email.
